name: Reusable Breastmilk Storage Bags Blue
description: MADE TO MILK REUSABLE BREASTMILK STORAGE BAGS (2PC) BLUE
long_description:
Made to Milk silicone breastmilk storage bags are the perfect way to store your breastmilk in a super safe and convenient way. Silicone is naturally bacteria resistant and helps to keep milk fresher for longer. What a win!

Our bags are made from food-grade silicone, have a 240ml capacity and are completely leak-proof! Trust us, we've put them to the test. 

The best part - once your breastfeeding journey is over these awesome bags keep on providing as the perfect storage for snacks, yoghurts, etc. while on the go with your little one.

Made to Milk breastmilk storage bags are super easy to sterilise; and are dishwasher and freezer safe. They also feature a unique lock slider to keep milk secure while at home or on-the-go. And they stand upright for easy pouring and have a measuring tool on the rear - I mean, how could this get any better. Really.

Each box comes with a set of two silicone storage bags + lock sliders.

name: Disposable Postpartum Underwear Large
description: BUBBA BUMP DISPOSABLE POSTPARTUM UNDERWEAR LARGE 8 PACK
long_description:
Each polybag pack contains 8 pairs of disposable postpartum underwear.

2 packs (16 pairs) is the recommended minimum for postpartum.

Disposable maternity underwear that eliminates the need for uncomfortable, awkward pads in your postpartum journey. Our postpartum maternity underwear is your answer to comfort in the post birth period. You can even wear them when your waters break! Designed for mamas and endorsed by midwives, you know this product is a hospital bag essential. 

Our postpartum disposable maternity underwear is leak free, super comfortable and leaves you feeling secure post birth. Perfect for the initial postpartum ( fourth trimester) and beyond. You can wear them in place of sanitary pads and/ or panty liners - a must for urinary incontinence, weak bladder muscles and pelvic core postpartum. Our postpartum underwear is a recovery essential!

Our disposable postpartum underwear absorbs blood, lochia, and can even be worn when waters break. They absorb 3X more than regular maxi pads and designed to be completely leak free. 

Perfect for both C-section and vaginal birth as they are high waisted and won't irritate c section wounds. 

Our maternity panties even tear at the sides for easy disposal once used. Tear and chuck! Just what you need for your third trimester when convenience and ease is everything. 

Our disposable maternity underwear is free from all fragrances and bleach.


Not sure what size to get? As a rough guide, size 12-20 should go Large and 6-10 Medium. 

Having a planned C section? If you are on the fence for sizing go Large as you will be swollen for a little bit after your C section
  • Endorsed by the Australian College of Midwives

  • 3 x more absorbent than maternity pads

  • Perfect for both C Section Births and Vaginal Births

  • Tear at the sides for easy disposal

  • Leak Free & Comfortable

  • Designed for Comfort: Provide a comfortable fit without putting pressure on the abdomen, which is especially important after childbirth..

  • Hygienic: Designed for single use, they help maintain good hygiene standards during the postpartum recovery period..

  • Time-Saving: Eliminates the need for washing and caring for soiled underwear, saving time and energy for the new mother..
ingredients: Non Woven, tissue, pulp fluff, unbleached and perfume free.

name: Instant Padsicles
long_description:
Our Instant Ice Padsicles or perineum cooling pads are another must-have for your postpartum recovery tool box. With the instant cooling effect lasting for 30+ minutes, it will mean your sore, tender and swollen lady parts will feel so much better.

Say goodbye to getting out a maxi pad, slathering it in witch hazel and aloe vera, putting it in the freezer to cool and repeat with our convenient pads to support your perineum during childbirth and in your following postpartum period.

Our perineum cooling maxi pads are an instant 2 in 1 solution for perineal and vaginal discomfort post-birth. They provide instant relief in the postpartum recovery time. Snap, pop onto your underwear and go! No freezer or preparation necessary!

Not only do our perineum cooling pads provide cold relief for your sore and tender birthing parts, they're also amazing for perineal tearing and stitches too. Each one of the soft, super-absorbent pads will soak up fluid, blood and lochia all the while providing cool and much-needed relief for post-birth recovery and haemorrhoids.

The super-soft pad gives full coverage for your entire perineal area with an adhesive strip to keep it in place. 

Perineum Cooling Pads for C-sections
Our pads can also help support your perineum during childbirth whether you're birthing vaginally or with a C-section. Your Caesarean incision will be tender for a few weeks and our padsicles can help to relieve scar tenderness! Just pop the padsicles over your C-section (pad side down) incision dressing a few times a day for a couple of weeks to a couple of months to facilitate healing. This helps if you are having pain over the incision, irritation that comes on by the day's end, or swelling. A great time to pop the padsicles on is while you are feeding bub to feel the relief! 

Our instant perineum cooling pads are a must for the first few weeks post- birth as well as within your postpartum recovery
  • Instant Cooling Relief: Padsicles offer instant cooling relief to the perineal area, reducing swelling and discomfort post-delivery.

  • Easy to Use: They are pre-made and ready to use, eliminating the need for preparation, making them convenient for new mothers.

  • Hygienic: Individually wrapped for hygiene purposes, ensuring a clean application each time.

  • Soft and Comfortable: Padsicles are soft and gentle on sensitive skin, providing comfort during the healing process.

  • Pain Relief: Instant peri ice padsicles help alleviate pain and soreness in the perineal area, promoting comfort during the postpartum period.

  • Reduces Swelling: The cooling effect of padsicles helps reduce swelling and inflammation, aiding in the healing process..

  • Promotes Healing: They promote faster healing of tears, episiotomies, and other perineal discomforts commonly experienced after childbirth..

  • Flexible Design: The padsicles are flexible, conforming to the body's shape for targeted relief..

name: Perineum Ice/heat Gel Pack
description: BUBBA BUMP PERINEUM ICE/HEAT GEL PACK
long_description:
As a new/pregnant mum, you need to prepare for your recovery in the weeks after having a baby and giving birth. 


You will be quite sore and tender in your vaginal/ perineal area!

If you're thinking about self-care after baby, great! It can be easy to get so preoccupied in planning for the baby that you neglect to plan for your own healing and recovery.

Postpartum healing will require a few different tools to help soothe the pain, reduce swelling and offer some relief to any tears, stitched areas, or swollen. 

Postpartum ice packs reduce swelling and soothe sore and tender areas — helping you feel more comfortable in the days after childbirth, so you can enjoy time with your newborn! There are major benefits to using ice packs specifically designed for postpartum women.  

Even after a vaginal birth without tears, the entire perineal area and rectum will be swollen after birth, and you'll likely feel discomfort in the area for around three to five weeks. 

After pushing baby, no matter how long for, you will be a bit swollen. If you need any stitches or have torn, chances are you will be a bit sore and experience perineum discomfort for even longer. Our peri gel pads can really assist in offering some relief.

Perineal cool pads are an essential for use postpartum to cool and soothe your perineum and help any postpartum soreness you may experience.

When the perineum gel pad is heated, it can be also used while in the second stage of labour to reduce perineal tears when pressed against the perineal area (ask your medical team if you're unsure how to correctly apply) 

When frozen, the perineal ice pack provides soothing, cooling relief to the perineal area which may be irritated, swollen and tender from childbirth

The perineal ice pack can also be used to give instant relief from vaginal irritations and inflamed haemorrhoids, or to treat Symphysis Pubis Dysfunction (SPD). 

The pack can be heated or cooled.
  • Dual-Function Design: Ice/Heat perineum gel pads offer both cooling therapy (cold) and soothing warmth (heat), providing versatile relief for postpartum discomfort and swelling.

  • Flexible and Conforming: These gel pads are designed to be flexible and conform to the perineal area, ensuring targeted therapy and optimal comfort during postpartum recovery.

  • Reusable: The reusable nature of the gel pads allows for multiple uses, making them a cost-effective and eco-friendly solution for ongoing perineal care.

  • Relieves Discomfort: Cold therapy can help reduce perineal discomfort, swelling, and pain after childbirth, promoting healing and comfort in the delicate area.

  • Soothes and Calms: Heat therapy can help relax the perineal muscles, providing soothing relief for soreness, tension, and postpartum discomfort.

  • Reduces Swelling: Cold therapy can help minimize postpartum swelling and inflammation in the perineal area, aiding in the recovery process..

  • Promotes Healing: Both cold and heat therapy can promote blood flow, circulation, and tissue repair, facilitating faster healing and recovery after childbirth..

  • Comfort and Relaxation: The versatile therapy options of ice/heat perineum gel pads offer comfort, relaxation, and relief during the postpartum period, promoting overall well-being and recovery..
ingredients: non toxic gel beads

name: Witch Hazel Wipes
description: BUBBA BUMP WITCH HAZEL WIPES 50 PACK
long_description:
Soothing front to back goodness as you heal from childbirth. Targeted ingredients to help you nurture yourself with added Probiotics! 

Say goodbye to rough toilet paper in those early postpartum days and use our buttery soft witch hazel wipes as you heal after baby. They can also be used during pregnancy to aid in giving relief from haemorrhoids.

Bubba Bump soothing Postpartum Recovery Wipes are specifically formulated with witch hazel and help you breathe a sigh of relief as you navigate your recovery after having a baby.

We have you covered for burning, itching and discomfort.

Use to gently clean yourself or layer on a pad for cooling relief. Great as a compress for vaginal irritations and inflamed haemorrhoids too.

Pop the Witch Hazel Recovery Wipes in your hospital bag for instant postpartum relief and place a pack in each bathroom at home so you are postpartum prepared.
  • Natural Cleansing: Witch hazel wipes offer a natural and gentle cleansing solution, free from harsh chemicals that may irritate sensitive postpartum skin.

  • Soothing Properties: Infused with witch hazel, known for its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, these wipes can provide relief from postpartum discomfort and irritation.

  • Gentle on Skin: Witch hazel wipes are designed to be gentle on the delicate skin of new mothers, helping to maintain hygiene without causing dryness or irritation.

  • Convenience: Available in a portable and easy-to-use wipe format, witch hazel wipes offer convenience for postpartum care both at home and on the go.

  • Promotes Healing: The anti-inflammatory properties of witch hazel in the wipes can aid in promoting healing of perineal tears, stitches, or episiotomies after childbirth.

  • Relieves Discomfort: Witch hazel wipes help relieve postpartum discomfort, itching, and swelling in the perineal area, offering comfort and relief to new mothers..

  • Prevents Infections: By gently cleansing the perineal area, witch hazel wipes help reduce the risk of infections and promote overall postpartum hygiene..

  • Reduces Swelling: The cooling effect of witch hazel can help reduce swelling and inflammation in the perineal region, supporting the body's natural healing process..
ingredients: Made from Plant-Based Ingredients Biodegradable Super Soft Bamboo Phenoxyethanol, Polyaminopropyl biguanide, Didecyldimonium Chloride, Glycerin, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract, Chamomilla Recutita Flower Extract, Decyl glucoside, Hamamelis Virginiana Extract, Aqua

name: Mesh Underwear XL
long_description:
Want some undies you can just chuck out with your pad? Our postpartum mesh underwear is what you need .

Working perfectly alongside our instant perineum padsicles or after the initial really heavy bleeding post birth when you move from our disposable postpartum underwear to pads. 

 
Made from a super soft and ridiculously stretchy polyester and spandex, these are another great addition for the postpartum recovery tool box. Our postpartum mesh underwear is designed with your comfort and convenience in mind, providing optimal support and flexibility during the crucial healing period after childbirth. We have even made them higher cut to ensure comfort post caesarean birth as well. 

Includes 5 x panties
  • Disposable Design: Mesh underwear for postpartum recovery is typically disposable, eliminating the need for washing and providing a convenient and hygienic solution.

  • Breathable Mesh Fabric: The mesh material allows for increased airflow, promoting ventilation and reducing the risk of irritation or discomfort in the postpartum period.

  • Lightweight and Comfortable: Mesh underwear is lightweight and comfortable to wear, making it suitable for extended use during the postpartum recovery phase.

  • Flexibility: Mesh underwear is designed to be soft and flexible, providing gentle support without constriction, ideal for sensitive and healing postpartum bodies

  • Convenience: Disposable mesh underwear offers convenience by eliminating the need for laundry and providing a hassle-free postpartum hygiene solution.

  • Postpartum Healing: Mesh underwear can contribute to postpartum healing by offering a non-restrictive and gentle undergarment option that allows for optimal recovery..

  • Peace of Mind: By providing a reliable and practical solution for postpartum care, mesh underwear offers new mothers peace of mind and comfort during the recovery period..
ingredients: mesh panties

name: Peri Bottle
long_description:
What is a Peri Bottle Used for? 


The peri bottle is used for rinsing your perineum with warm water after you give birth. The small holes in the spout give you a gentle spray of water - offering relief from that awful sting if you're recovering from a tear, have stitches or are swollen. 

We're not going to sugarcoat it: Your vag will be sore, possibly torn, possibly stitched, and peeing will make it feel like it's on fire.  Our Peri Bottle will be a LIFESAVER.

Do you use a peri bottle after C section?

The location of your incision makes bending over difficult and mobility limited, so have an Upside Down Peri Bottle to help with cleanup without putting pressure or soreness on the wound site. 

The Upside Down design is practical and includes a narrow neck for a targeted and continuous stream of relief to the intended spot. 

Healing Tip: add our Postpartum Bath Soak to your bottle for even more relief

Pack our portable peri bottle in your hospital bag and use it in that first post birth bathroom trip to make it less scary and easier, as well in the first few days and weeks after giving birth. Included is a carry bag for so it can be discreet.

Also great to use to help clean yourself if you have  haemorrhoids and during menstruation. 
  • Promotes Healing: Using a peri bottle can promote healing after childbirth, surgeries, or other conditions affecting the perineal area by keeping it clean and free from irritants.

  • Relieves Discomfort: The gentle stream of water from a peri bottle can provide relief from discomfort, soreness, and itching in the perineal region.

  • Prevents Infections: Proper perineal hygiene with a peri bottle can help prevent infections and reduce the risk of postpartum complications.

  • Enhances Comfort: Peri bottles offer a soothing and gentle cleansing experience, particularly beneficial for individuals with sensitive skin.

  • Eco-Friendly: Using a peri bottle reduces the need for excessive toilet paper or wipes, contributing to a more environmentally friendly hygiene routine.

  • Cost-Effective: Compared to disposable wipes or other cleansing products, peri bottles offer a cost-effective and reusable solution for perineal care..

  • Easy-to-Use: These bottles are designed for easy handling, making them convenient for postpartum women or individuals with limited mobility..

  • Spray Nozzle: comes with a spray nozzle that allows for a gentle and controlled stream of water for cleansing the perineal area..
ingredients: BPA Free

It will bring relief for tears, stitches, haemorrhoids, and in general where you are swollen and sore. 

The perfect addition to your postpartum recovery tool box. A beautiful herbal sitz to nourish, heal and restore the body after birth.

Great for relieving pain and tears associated with birth, a beautiful herbal remedy to help reduce inflammation, ward against infection and great for relief in the bruising and swelling of muscles after birth too.
  • Postpartum Specific: Tailored to the needs of postpartum recovery, Bubba Bump sitz soaks are formulated to provide relief and promote healing in the sensitive perineal region.

  • Soothes Discomfort: Sitz soaks offer relief from postpartum discomfort, including soreness, swelling, and irritation in the perineal area.

name: Breast Ice/heat Gel Pack
description: BUBBA BUMP BREAST ICE/HEAT GEL PACK
long_description:
Bubba Bump Breast ice/heat packs can be warmed or cooled to assist with your breastfeeding journey.

They are designed to fit with ease inside your bra (nursing or normal), around your breasts and nipples, and even your breast pump! They are fantastic to use heated while pumping or expressing to assist with easing the flow of milk as you pump. 

Our breast gel pads are great when heated to helping antenatal expressing of colostrum too! (always consult your doctor or midwife before doing so) 

The breast gel pads are designed to help offer relief from soreness associated with breast feeding, blocked milk ducts and engorgement.

When heated, the breast pads can be used as a heat pack to help ease the flow of milk and blocked milk ducts. This can help reduce the amount of time needed for pumping or expressing. 

When frozen, the breast pads can be used as an ice pack to help offer relief from engorgement, pain from inflammation, mastitis, blocked ducts and overall discomfort that can be a result of breastfeeding. 

The pack can be heated or cooled.

Australian Register of Therapeutic Goods (ARTG) ID 374111
  • Dual Functionality: Ice/heat breast gel pads offer a dual-purpose design that can be used both for cooling therapy (cold) and soothing warmth (heat), providing versatility for various breastfeeding concerns.

  • Flexible and Conforming: These gel pads are flexible and easily conform to the shape of the breast, ensuring optimal coverage and targeting specific areas for relief.

  • Adjustable Temperature: Gel pads can be heated in warm water or a microwave for heat therapy and chilled in the freezer for cold therapy, offering customizable temperature control.

  • Relieves Engorgement: Cold therapy can help reduce swelling and engorgement, providing relief for discomfort associated with milk production and breast fullness.

  • Soothes Soreness: Heat therapy can help relax sore muscles and provide soothing relief for breast tenderness, mastitis, blocked ducts, or general breastfeeding discomfort.

  • Promotes Milk Flow: Cold therapy can help promote blood flow and milk flow, while heat therapy can aid in stimulating let-down reflex and milk production..

  • Encourages Relaxation: Warm gel pads offer a comforting and relaxing experience, promoting relaxation and stress relief for breastfeeding mothers..
ingredients: 2 x gel pads

description: REXONA WOMEN DEODORANT 96HR CLINICAL AEROSOL SUMMER STRENGTH 180ML
long_description:
Everybody sweats, sure. But not everybody sweats in the same way. Some of us sweat more, but we still want to live life without the stress of stickiness and sweat patches. That's why we've developed Rexona Women Summer Strength Clinical Protection Antiperspirant Aerosol, offering 3x more sweat protection* than a basic antiperspirant deodorant, with a clean, exotic scent. Defence+ technology forms an anti-sweat microshield that keeps you fresh, dry and confident for up to 96 hours. Better still, our innovative MotionSense technology releases bursts of fresh, invigorating fragrance when you need it most. It works like this: unique microcapsules sit on the surface of your skin. When you move, friction breaks those microcapsules releasing more fragrance. So, the more you move, the more it protects. The scent? Exotic pear and pineapple draped over a heart of jasmine with traces of smooth vanilla and amber. When you work hard, Rexona works harder. Grab this antiperspirant deodorant for women to get all-day freshness and 96-hour protection that works in sync with your body for nonstop confidence from morning to night. For optimum sweat protection, apply daily to clean, dry underarms. Shake well, then spray in short bursts in a well-ventilated area, holding the can 15 cm away from your underarm. No need to reapply. Rexona gives you all the backup you need. Rexona. It won't let you down. *vs a basic antiperspirant deodorant

name: Women Deodorant Advanced 72hr Aerosol Coconut & Jasmine
description: DOVE WOMEN DEODORANT ADVANCED 72HR AEROSOL COCONUT & JASMINE 250ML
long_description:
It's time to give your delicate underarm skin the same care you give the rest of your body. Part of our most caring antiperspirant range, Dove Advanced Care Coconut & Jasmine Flower Antiperspirant Deodorant Aerosol is enriched with a plant-based moisturiser to give you soft and smooth underarms. With the utmost care, our deodorant spray helps delicate underarm skin recover from irritation caused by shaving. Providing up to 72 hours of protection, the alcohol-free* formula keeps odour and sweat at bay and helps you kick-start your day with a long-lasting scent. Let our spray deodorant whisk you away to a tropical paradise with the comforting warmth of coconut, blended with the calming scent of jasmine flower.

How to use: For best results, shake well, then spray in short bursts in a well-ventilated area, holding the can 15 cm away from your underarm. Use every day. Do not apply to broken or sore skin.

At Dove, we believe no young person should be held back from reaching their full potential. Since 2004, we've been building self-esteem and confidence in young people - and by 2030, we'll have helped a quarter of a billion young people through our educational programmes and resources.

  • Dove Advanced Care Coconut & Jasmine Flower Antiperspirant Deodorant Aerosol provides 72 hours of effective sweat and odour protection

  • Dove Advanced Care is our most caring antiperspirant range, using innovative triple moisturising technology and plant-based moisturiser for soft and smooth underarm skin, even after shaving

  • Infused with a creamy coconut and jasmine flower scent, our deodorant spray keeps you feeling fresh all day and beyond

  • Dove antiperspirant aerosol is made in Australia with renewable grid electricity and comes in a recyclable metal can

  • This spray deodorant features our most caring alcohol-free*, kind-to-skin formula for superior skin care

  • Dove deodorants are PETA-Approved Vegan and Dove does not test on animals anywhere in the world.

  • *ethyl alcohol.

name: Addictive Brilliant Shine Shampoo
long_description:
Shine on! Sunsilk Addictive Brilliant Shine Shampoo leaves your hair beautifully scented, glossy and shiny from root to tip. Its exclusive formula is enriched with almond oil and pearl extract to help bring out your hair's natural shine. Today, you have more possibilities than ever before. Every second is an opportunity to live life to the fullest. And you want to be beautiful when you do that, don't you? But life is hectic, and we need our hair to be beautiful and stay that way through all the twists and turns. That's where Sunsilk Addictive Brilliant Shine Shampoo comes in. Simple, vibrant, full of colour and scents, Sunsilk stands shoulder to shoulder with you every step of the way. In a vibrant and constantly changing world, we can celebrate each challenge with protected, repaired, strong and well-groomed hair. With decades of experience in each bottle, you can count on us for all your hair care needs. They say you only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough. Welcome to our world, providing hair care for girls who like to experiment, explore, dream and discover. Simply massage Sunsilk Addictive Brilliant Shine Shampoo onto wet hair, then rinse thoroughly. For best results, use daily with our Addictive Brilliant Shine Conditioner.
  • Sunsilk Addictive Brilliant Shine Shampoo is specially designed to help you enjoy glossy and shiny hair from root to tip

  • Our exclusive shampoo formula locks in a fresh fragrance for 48 hours*

  • Enriched almond oil and pearl extract, working to bring out your hair's natural shine**

  • Sunsilk Addictive Brilliant Shine Shampoo is both paraben and dye free for the hair care you deserve

  • Sunsilk shampoo and conditioner bottles are made with minimum 25% recycled plastic

  • At Sunsilk, we believe in supporting and inspiring girls everywhere by giving them hair ready for all possibilities.

  • *Up to 48-hour fragrance..

  • **With use of Sunsilk Addictive Brilliant Shine Shampoo and Conditioner vs non-conditioning shampoo..

name: Conditioner Smooth & Silky
long_description:
TRESemme's Smooth & Silky Conditioner is specially formulated for dry, frizz-prone hair, leaving it 2x smoother* and salon-soft. Enriched with sunflower seed oil and vitamin A, our conditioner tames unruly hair and delivers intense moisturisation where your hair needs it most. Free from parabens, alcohol and dyes, this conditioner is light enough for daily use.

For best results, use after shampooing with TRESemme Smooth & Silky Shampoo. Apply through hair, running a wide tooth comb or fingers from root to tip to detangle. Leave on for 2-3 minutes then rinse thoroughly before styling with your favourite TRESemme products.

Since our salon's beginnings in 1948, TRESemme has been creating professional-quality hair care products to help you achieve the look and style you want, every time. TRESemme understands how great hair gives you the confidence to walk taller every day. Inspired by stylists and tested in salons, the products are designed to help you achieve a salon-gorgeous hairstyle at home. TRESemme delivers salon-quality formulas without the salon price tag. Our bottles are made in Australia, with 50% Australian Recycled Plastic and are recyclable. TRESemme does not test on animals and is PETA approved worldwide. To learn more about the range or access stylist tips and tricks, visit the TRESemme website.

*TRESemme Smooth & Silky System vs. non-conditioning shampoo.
  • TRESemme's Smooth & Silky Conditioner helps with frizz control and makes hair 2x smoother*

  • Specially formulated for dry, frizz-prone hair, our conditioner delivers intense moisturisation where your hair needs it most

  • Enriched with sunflower seed oil and vitamin A to moisturise unruly hair and leave it salon-soft

  • Our professional-quality conditioner contains no parabens, alcohol or dyes

  • For best results, use after TRESemme Smooth & Silky Shampoo, applying from root to tip to calm frizz

  • Our moisturising conditioner is made in Australia and PETA approved.

description: BIC RAZOR SOLEIL TWILIGHT LAVENDER 4 PACK
long_description:
Who knew shaving could be this much fun and smell so heavenly? The BIC Soleil Scent women's razor is an irresistible addition to your bathroom because not only does it have triple-blade technology, it also has a curved handle designed just for comfortable shaving. Combine this with two soft grips and you get great shaving control and comfort, even with wet hands in the shower. With three high-quality stainless steel blades, you can go as bare as you dare any time of the year and achieve a super smooth shave on legs, underarms, and bikini lines. This razor easily glides over your skin with two lubricating strips enriched with Vitamin E. Last but not least, it leaves a lovely floral scent. The BIC Soleil Scent razor for women is available in your choice of four sophisticated colours so you'll always look forward to using it. Shaving is never dull with BIC, which also offers a complete line of top-quality women's razors in a rainbow of colours expertly designed to meet their specific shaving needs. With over 40 years of experience engineering and producing razors, BIC knows a thing or two about shaving. The uncompromising quality you expect and value you demand.
  • A glamorous scent-ual experience: the handle on this 3-blade razor is specially designed for women and releases a lovely floral scent

  • Triple blades for a close efficient shave: the perfect choice for bare-as-you-dare results on legs, underarms and bikini areas

name: Cellular Epigenetics Rejuvenating Serum
long_description:
Want to reverse the appearance of your skin age in 2 weeks*? Introducing our NEW NIVEA Cellular Epigenetix Rejuvenating Serum, with a breakthrough ingredient EPICELLINE. As you age, your skin ages with you. But have you noticed some people's skin appears to age faster than others? That is because lifestyle and environmental factors, such as stress and pollution, impact your skin's epigenetic patterns, which affect the age of your skin. This powerful ingredient was discovered after 15 years of research and testing of 50,000 actives, and helps reverse the appearance of ageing signs. Scientifically proven by Patented Age Clock Technology to reverse the appearance of skin age within 2 weeks*. So, you can take control on how your skin ages! Skin compatibility dermatologically approved.
*score improvement in scientific and self-assessment studies, 30-43 women, 2024

  • For 98% proven skin rejuvenation*

  • Skin compatibility dermatologically approved

name: Digital Timer
long_description:
Ideal for all your kitchen needs, from sweet to savoury, cakes to bread, cookies to pies, our Digital Timer will make sure that everything you make in the kitchen comes out perfect.

To count up press Start. When done, press Stop. To reset, press ‘Min' and ‘Sec' at the same time.
Count down by pressing ‘Min' to set the minutes, ‘sec' to set the seconds, and ‘start/stop' to begin the countdown.
Press the ‘start/stop' button to turn the alarm off.
Now you can take your cake out of the oven, slice and serve!

Forget about nails, screws and tacks, Command™ Hooks are fast and easy to hang! Rehanging them is as easy as applying a Command™ Refill Strip, so you can take down, move and reuse them again and again!

name: Creamy Delights With Grilled Chicken & Cheddar Cheese In Gravy Cat Food
description: FANCY FEAST CREAMY DELIGHTS WITH GRILLED CHICKEN & CHEDDAR CHEESE IN GRAVY CAT FOOD 85 GRAM
long_description:
Make every day delicious with FANCY FEAST Classic recipes. An extensive array of delicious, mouth-watering flavours and tantalising textures your cat will love.

FANCY FEAST Delights With Cheddar Grilled Chicken & Cheddar Cheese Feast In Gravy is a highly palatable, gourmet wet cat food made for adult cats. Grilled cuts made with chicken, slow-cooked to perfection in a succulent gravy and infused with real aged cheddar cheese. A glorious feast for your cat! 

All FANCY FEAST Classic recipes are 100% complete and balanced, with the goodness of high protein and the essential vitamins and minerals your cat needs, making mealtime delicious and nutritious. 

Each recipe comes in an easy-to-open and easy-to-serve 85g can that makes mealtime simple and hassle free. Serve alone or mix with dry food for a delectable texture, and a great way to add moisture to your cat's diet. If your cat craves a variety of flavour combinations, try some of the other recipes within our range to keep her excited. 

No one loves your cat like you do - and no one loves helping you find ways to delight your cat like FANCY FEAST. FANCY FEAST has been setting the standard in gourmet cat food since 1982, creating and crafting unique taste experiences time and again. Delicious tastes. Irresistible textures. Thoughtful details. Each FANCY FEAST recipe has been carefully crafted using high quality ingredients because your cat deserves nothing but the best. Your cat will taste the love with every delicious bite, and you will feel good about what you put in her dish. With over 60 irresistible recipes in the range, there's a plate for every palate.
  • Grilled cuts of chicken in a succulent gravy and infused with real aged cheddar cheese

  • Highly palatable gourmet wet cat food

  • Made with high-quality ingredients

  • Provides 100% complete and balanced nutrition for everyday feeding

  • A great way to add moisture to your cat's diet

  • Comes in a convenient single-serve can.

  • Available in a variety of different flavours to keep mealtime exciting.
ingredients: Poultry Broth, Chicken, Liver, Wheat Gluten, Meat By-Products, Vegetable Starch-Modified, Cheese (Source Of Cheddar Cheese), Artificial And Natural Flavors, Salt, Sodium Caseinate, Vegetable Oil, Tricalcium Phosphate, Soy Protein Concentrate, Corn Starch, Added Color, Minerals [Potassium Chloride, Magnesium Sulfate, Zinc Sulfate, Ferrous Sulfate, Copper Sulfate, Manganese Sulfate, Potassium Iodide], Dried Whey, Taurine, Choline Chloride, Vitamins [Thiamine Mononitrate (Vitamin B-1), Vitamin E Supplement, Niacin (Vitamin B-3), Calcium Pantothenate (Vitamin B-5), Vitamin Supplement, Menadione Sodium Bisulfite Complex (Vitamin K), Pyridoxine Hydrochloride (Vitamin B-6), Riboflavin Supplement (Vitamin B-12), Vitamin Supplement, Biotin (Vitamin B-7), Folic Acid (Vitamin B-9), Vitamin D-3 Supplement], Sorbic Acid (A Preservative).
